titleStmt.title: SII 22.104: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 104. (A.R. No. 104 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE. SADĀŚIVADĒVA-MAHĀRĀYA—Śaka [1471]

summary.p: The date is given as Saumya, Tulā śu. 10, Rōhiṇi, Monday corresponding probably to A.D. 1549, October 30. It was Wednesday and Śatabhishak on this date.

This records an endowment of the village Śuttamalligai with all its wet and dry lands in Meykuṉṟāda-vaḷanāḍu alias Narippaḷḷi-nāḍu in Magadai-Maṇḍalam on the southern bank of the Pennai, by Rāmappa-Nāyakar (son of ?) Aḍappam Sūrappa-Krishṇama-Nāyakar for the merit of the king, for burning 30 lamps during the services every day in the shrine of Aḻagiya-Nāchchiyār in the temple of Tāṉtōṉṟi-Āḷudaiyanayiṉār at Śaṇbai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu śuvasti . śrīmanmahamaṇṭalecura metiṉi micura kaṇṭa kaṭṭāri cāḷuva naraciṅkatevamahāirāyar Accutatevamahairāyar kumāra cataracivatevamahairāyar piṟutivi Irācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cākāttam ka Itanmel cellāniṉṟa cavvummiya cavvaccaram tulānāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu tecamiyum rocaṇiyum peṟṟa comavārattunāḷ peṇṇai vaṭakarai
vāṇakoppāṭināṭu virarācentiracoḻapuramāṉa caṇpai Uṭaiyār tirut tāṉtoṉṟi Āḷuṭaiyanayiṉār Ammai Aḻakiyanācciyār Ammaikku cantiviḷakku cuvāmi Aṭappam cūrappanāyakkaraiyyaṉ kiṣṇaṭṭamanāyakkaraiyya(ṉ) cuvāmi catāciva tevamaharāyaṟku taṉmamāka Ammai Aḻakiyanācciyār Ammaikkuc cantiviḷakkukku koḷḷa Irāmappa nāyakkar viṭṭa
ciṟuvaṅkūr cirmaiyāṉa maṅkalattu piṭākai cuttamallikai ciṟuvaṅkūr nāṭṭavar nāṭṭukkaṇakkappiḷḷai muṉpāka peṇṇaikkut teṉkarai makataimaṇṭalattu meykuṉṟāta vaḷanāṭāṉa narippaḷḷi nāṭṭil cuttamallikaiyil nañcai puñcai nāṟpāṟkellaiyum cantiviḷakkukku tiṉam Oṉṟukku muppatu viḷakkāka kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭu cantirātittavaraiyum celvatāka Inta
cuttamallikai kalveṭṭiviṭṭom Inta cuttamallikai nāṟpāṟ kellaikku viparam peṇṇai Āṟṟukku teṟku taṉmam yiṭṭa nallūr yellaikku meṟku Ārukaip pāṭi yellaikkum Ātaṉūr yellaikkum vaṭakku purocappaṭṭu yellaikkuk kiḻakku yiṉṉāṉkellaiyum Uḷpaṭṭa cuttamallikai cantiviḷakkukku viṭṭom Inta cutta mallikai caṇpait tevaThe inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 22.104 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
